title: neotinea intacta
intro: Neotinea intacta, also known as the butterfly orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Neotinea intacta are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or dried powder, making it suitable for various herbal preparations, although its usage should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
